documents.title: Build Orchestration (builder.rs)
documents.raw_content:
Drives Docker Buildx or Podman+BuildKit to produce deterministic OCI image tarballs using SOURCE_DATE_EPOCH and rewrite-timestamp=true.

BuildParams — raw CLI input struct. Builder — resolved/validated config struct. Builder::new(params) resolves env var fallbacks and validates constraints. Builder::build() dispatches to docker_build() or podman_build() based on runtime.

Env vars: REPRO_RUNTIME, REPRO_DATETIME, REPRO_SOURCE_DATE_EPOCH, REPRO_CACHE, REPRO_ROOTLESS.

Docker path: creates a named buildx builder keyed by SHA-256 of buildkit image, then runs docker buildx build with --output type=docker,rewrite-timestamp=true.

Podman path: runs podman run with buildctl-daemonless.sh entrypoint, volume-mounts context/output/cache dirs, passes buildctl build --frontend dockerfile.v0.

Resolution functions: resolve_runtime (CLI > env > auto-detect), resolve_sde (CLI > env, parses RFC3339/ISO dates), resolve_rootless (podman-only constraint), resolve_buildkit_image (pin by digest, docker.io prefix for podman), resolve_buildkit_args/resolve_buildx_args (runtime-specific validation).

Default BuildKit images pinned by digest: moby/buildkit:v0.19.0.

n functions: resolve_runtime (CLI > env > auto-detect), resolve_sde (CLI > env, parses RFC3339/ISO dates), resolve_rootless (podman-only constraint), resolve_buildkit_image (pin by digest, docker.io prefix for podman), resolve_buildkit_args/resolve_buildx_args (runtime-specific validation).

documents.title: CLI Entry Point (main.rs)
OCI Tarball Parser (oci.rs)
documents.raw_content:
OCI tarball parsing and analysis. Compatible with OCI image layout spec.

ManifestInfo — parsed manifest/index entry with path, contents, digest (SHA-256), media_type, platform, and child manifests.
ManifestDescriptor — child reference with digest, mediaType, platform.
PlatformSpec — os + architecture.

parse_tarball(path) — entry point. DFS traversal starting from index.json, recursively following manifest descriptors.
parse_manifest — opens tarball, extracts file by normalized path, computes SHA-256 digest, parses JSON.
get_file_from_tarball — handles ./ prefix variations in tar entry paths.
flate2_or_raw — auto-detects gzip compression by file extension.
normalize_path — converts sha256:abc... to blobs/sha256/abc...
print_info — displays parsed OCI info, truncates contents unless --show-contents.
verify_digest — compares computed digest against expected value.
